name: Fernando Sor
abstract: Fernando Sor (baptised 14 February 1778 – 10 July 1839) was a Spanish classical guitarist and composer of the late Classical era and early Romantic era. Best known for writing solo classical guitar music, he also composed an opera (at the age of 19), three symphonies, guitar duos, piano music, songs, a Mass, and at least two successful b…

about_quotes.speaker: Laurence Juber
about_quotes.evidence: Fernando Sor, for example, was a very accomplished composer. He was a songwriter, he wrote a vocal method, he wrote a guitar method.
about_quotes.doc_title: Laurence Juber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Glasgow, Scotland, July 27, 2016 [interview 1 of 2]
